As the Paris 2024 Olympics unfold, watching live broadcasts in cinemas has become a popular trend in China. Since the opening ceremony, cinemas have offered this service, allowing fans to cheer for Team China together. During Paris 2024, more than 800 cinemas across the country will broadcast over 20 sports live, including table tennis, badminton, diving and volleyball. The high-quality audio-visual equipment in cinemas enhances the viewing experience, providing an unparalleled way to enjoy the Games.
